steps.name: demo-scenario-selection
steps.summary: PK1 selected the 10-minute demo flow: primary 1115 significant financing/repurchase path through decision, measurement, journal entries, review pack, F/S draft candidates, and audit anomaly linkage; secondary 1116 lease review-pack card. Excluded broad 1109, DART disclosure, and standalone audit analytics from the first demo.

steps.name: demo-command-surface
steps.summary: PK2 added scripts/demo_poc.py and tests/test_demo_poc.py. The revenue-financing scenario writes seven markdown demo files under docs/reports/demo-poc: index, two 1115 review packs, statement candidates, audit analytics note, audit-FACC links, and a 1116 lease review pack. Verified by pytest and a real script run.
